title: Perception probe: OUT from the index JSON alone (no media, no sheet)
prompt: index.json is the perception index (word timings, silences, sentences, energy) of a ~22-second interview answer clip. The media itself is NOT available. Determine where the cut should end: the OUT point lands just after the speaker's final word, with a natural tail of at most ~0.8 seconds - without cutting off any of the ending, even a quiet one. Write your answer to answer.json as {"out": <seconds>}. Do not render or fetch anything.
